condition.description: Defines a set of conditions that must be met for the IAM binding to be applied, such as attributes or expressions to control access.

members.description: List of identities (e.g., users, groups, or service accounts) to which the specified IAM role will be applied.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to be assigned to members for the Pub/Sub subscription. Must be a predefined role such as `roles/pubsub.viewer`.

subscription.description: Defines the Pub/Sub subscription to which IAM bindings will be applied. Must be in the format `projects/{project}/subscriptions/{subscription_name}`.
